title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/02/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate downward. The most-traded I2505 contract finally closedat 799.5 yuan/mt, down 0.74% for the day. Traders' willingness to sell weakened; steel mills remained cautious and observed, with moderate purchase willingness over the weekend; market transaction sentiment was sluggish.
